name: SharingResultState
summary: Indicates a state of Tekla Structures and model after sharing operation.

enum_values.name: Undefined
enum_values.summary: The underfined state. It is the default value which is also set when the code is not able to determine the current state.

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.summary: After a successfull operation or an error, model is still opened.

enum_values.name: ModelReopened
enum_values.summary: After an error, model is reopened to the last saved.

enum_values.name: ModelClosed
enum_values.summary: After an error, model is closed.

enum_values.name: ProcessClosed
enum_values.summary: After an error, model is closed and Structures process closes.
